pages.title: About Me - Shaun Davies MP
pages.h1: "This is my town, our town and I wouldn't want to be anywhere else."
pages.meta_description: "This is my town, our town and I wouldn't want to be anywhere else." I’m lucky enough to be born and bred in Telford. I was made in Telford. I’m a product of this town. This is my town, our town and I wouldn’t want to be anywhere else.I grew up surrounded by love and
pages.text_excerpt: About Me - Shaun Davies MP Shaun.Davies.MP@Parliament.uk 01952 973 714 Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact CONTACT Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact "This is my town, our town and I wouldn't want to be anywhere else." I’m lucky enough to be born and bred in Telford. I was made in Telford. I’m a product of this town. This is my town, our town and I wouldn’t want to be anywhere else. I grew up surrounded by love and watching my family graft to make ends meet. We were always there for one another but we also knew hard times. I was a child that experienced poverty. I vividly remember switching the lights off in our council house and lying on the floor as debt collectors came to our door. My parents knew hard work. My dad served in the armed forces and later as a bus and HGV driver. My mom had two or three jobs to support me and my brothers and sister. I was the first in my family to go to university supported by my parents, my auntie and my amazing nan – who I lived with from the age of 11. I’m proud of the law degree that I achieved but I’m even more proud and incredibly grateful that my family gave me the wings to fly and championed my journey. I’m now a husband and a dad and trying to instil the same values in my own family. Our town is a place where if people work hard they can achieve success. They will also be supported on their journey to thrive and that’s a message I’m keen to share. I’m still that boy from Telford; Dawley to be precise. I still want to make a difference; not just for me and my family but for all the people and the communities I am so honoured to represent in parliament. Y our ambitions are my ambitions. Whether you were born here or you have chosen Telford as a place to live and work, I will always have your back – just like my own family had, and continue to have, mine. pages.title: Contact - Shaun Davies MP
pages.meta_description: Contact Team Telford Do you need help? As your MP Shaun can help with a variety of issues and concerns. Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to support Telford residents. Here's how we can help you: Write to Shaun Keeping the issue private, I can write to the relevant
headings: h3: As your MP Shaun can help with a variety of issues and concerns.
h2: Here's how we can help you:
h3: How to write to Shaun
pages.text_excerpt: Contact - Shaun Davies MP Shaun.Davies.MP@Parliament.uk 01952 973 714 Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact CONTACT Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact Contact Team Telford Do you need help? As your MP Shaun can help with a variety of issues and concerns. Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to support Telford residents. Here's how we can help you: Write to Shaun Keeping the issue private, I can write to the relevant department, official, or Minister or make a personal appointment to discuss the issue. This can often go a long way to providing a solution to your issue. Making the issue public I can also help to make the issue public by raising it in the House of Commons, where it will be officially recorded, and could potentially come to the attention of the press and public. Meet with Shaun Shaun holds regular surgeries and coffee mornings across Telford every month. Reach out to Shaun via email or post and the team will work with you to listen to your concerns. CONTACT TEAM TELFORD Shaun Davies MP has a small team in both Telford and London working hard to support thousands of residents every month. All mail must be screened before reaching our constituency office for security reasons. Sending mail to the constituency office will lead to delays. pages.title: New Youth Hub in Telford - Shaun Davies MP
pages.meta_description: Support my call for a new Youth Hub in Telford. More than 30% of Telford’s population are young people under the age of 24. I know from speaking to young people, parents and businesses in our area how important it is that everyone gets the opportunity to succeed in the world of work. It’s critical
headings: h3: New Youth Hub in Telford
h2: Support my call for a new Youth Hub in Telford.
h3: Let me know your thoughts by filling out this survey:
pages.text_excerpt: New Youth Hub in Telford - Shaun Davies MP Shaun.Davies.MP@Parliament.uk 01952 973 714 Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact CONTACT Home My Work Work Experience latest News Events About Me Contact New Youth Hub in Telford April 17, 2026 Support my call for a new Youth Hub in Telford. More than 30% of Telford’s population are young people under the age of 24. I know from speaking to young people, parents and businesses in our area how important it is that everyone gets the opportunity to succeed in the world of work. It’s critical for young people themselves and it’s critical for a thriving local economy. The new youth hubs are single location with Jobcentre services, council support, employers and training under one roof. The Government has announced plans to deliver 80 new Youth Hubs across the UK, including one for Telford & Wrekin. This is part of a national mission to ensure every area has access to opportunities in work, training and volunteering. I am pushing to ensure that Telford is the location for our local Youth Hub. This is a significant opportunity for our town, and I want to make sure Telford’s young people benefit directly from this investment. I want every child and young person in Telford to have the best possible start in life and the opportunity to thrive. Youth Hubs bring together employment support, the local authority, employers and training providers in one place, offering joined-up support at a crucial stage in young people’s lives. Securing this Youth Hub for Telford would make a real and lasting difference to opportunity, skills and life chances across our community. Let me know your thoughts by filling out this survey: Do you support Shaun’s call for a new youth hub in Telford? Yes No Not sure Name Email Postcode Address Any other comments about youth services in Telford you would like to share with your MP By submitting this form you are agreeing for Shaun Davies MP to keep you updated via letter, email and texts on the latest campaigns, events and democratic engagement opportunities. You can manage your preferences or unsubscribe at any time. Please contact the office of Shaun Davies MP. shaun.davies.mp@parliament.uk To ensure GDPR compliance, where 'no' is selected, your data will be processed with the express purpose of delivering the content you have signed up for, for example, but not limited to: communications from Shaun Davies MP and the Labour Party - you will receive no further communications from Shaun Davies MP. No, I do not want to receive updates or further communication. Share Standing up for Telford As your MP for Telford, Shaun’s guiding principle in Parliament is to tirelessly fight for his hometown and continue to demand the return of health services to our PRH. Shaun is also committed to supporting residents and raising their concerns with those in power.
